DICOM Viewer
Features Download
GitHub

DICOM Viewer

Open-source medical imaging platform with 2D slice view, multi-planar reconstruction, and interactive 3D volume rendering — built with Flutter, runs everywhere.

Download View on GitHub
macOS Windows Linux iOS Android Open Source Flutter 3 DICOM / NEMA

Capabilities

Everything you need for medical imaging

From basic slice browsing to advanced volume rendering — a full imaging workflow in one app.

🔬

2D Slice View

Browse axial, sagittal, and coronal slices with smooth navigation, keyboard shortcuts, and pixel-perfect zoom.

🧊

3D Volume Rendering

Interactive point-cloud and voxel-box volume renderer. Rotate, clip, and inspect the full anatomy in real time.

✚

Multi-Planar Reconstruction

Synchronised MPR layout with crosshair navigation — instantly correlate structures across all three planes.

🎨

Advanced Image Filtering

Bilateral denoising, anisotropic diffusion, edge-aware upscaling, sharpening, contrast and brightness control.

📐

Measurement Tools

Distance and angle measurements, window / level adjustment, pan, zoom, and crosshair — all in one toolbar.

📂

Study Browser

Hierarchical patient → study → series browser with search, thumbnails, recent studies strip, and metadata display.

Download

Available on every platform

Pre-built binaries for all major operating systems. No account or subscription required.

Latest release loading…
🍎 macOS Apple Silicon & Intel – Fetching… 🪟 Windows x64 – Fetching… 🐧 Linux x64 – Fetching… 📱 iOS Unsigned IPA – Fetching… 🤖 Android APK (sideload) – Fetching…
🍎 macOS
Unzip the archive, then right-click the .app and choose Open to bypass Gatekeeper on first launch. Or run:
xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine dicom_viewer.app
🪟 Windows
Unzip and run dicom_viewer.exe. If SmartScreen appears, click More info → Run anyway.
🐧 Linux
Extract the .tar.gz and run ./dicom_viewer. You may need: sudo apt install libgtk-3-0
📱 iOS
The IPA is unsigned. Install via AltStore or Sideloadly.
🤖 Android
Enable Install from unknown sources in Settings → Security, then open the APK to install.

Technology

Built with

A modern, all-Dart stack with zero native plugin dependencies for the core viewer logic.

Flutter 3 Dart CustomPainter / Canvas Drift (SQLite) DICOM / NEMA Volume Ray-casting Image Filtering File Picker
DICOM Viewer © 2026
